title: First End-to-End Product Repo Operation Prototype

endToEndFlow.name: Intake
endToEndFlow.description: Receive task request from じゅんやさん / こさめ/GPT PM

endToEndFlow.name: Product Repo Task Packet
endToEndFlow.description: Generate task packet with scope, goals, allowed file zones

endToEndFlow.name: Connection Bridge
endToEndFlow.description: Build dry-run connection bridge to target repo (v27)

endToEndFlow.name: Work Order
endToEndFlow.description: Generate detailed work order with file zones and rollback plan (v25)

endToEndFlow.name: External Repo Preflight
endToEndFlow.description: Safety preflight checks before any edits (v25.5)

endToEndFlow.name: Execution Prompt Pack
endToEndFlow.description: Generate Claude execution prompt for target repo (v24)

endToEndFlow.name: Dry Run Dispatch
endToEndFlow.description: Dispatch console dry-run — describe what Claude will do, no real execution (v28)

endToEndFlow.name: Handoff & Result Import
endToEndFlow.description: Import Claude result report; scan for safety issues (v26)

endToEndFlow.name: Result Review
endToEndFlow.description: Review imported results: approve / revise / reject / hold (v29)

endToEndFlow.name: Commit Candidate Decision
endToEndFlow.description: Final commit/push/tag decision — じゅんやさん YES required

Kosame/GPT: PM: intake review and task scoping
Safety gate: approve/hold/reject at each stage
Final review before presenting to じゅんやさん
Claude: Implementation: generate task packets, work orders, execution prompts
Dry-run execution: edit files within approved zones only
Verification: run node --check and test suite
Handoff: generate result report for review
Human: じゅんやさん: final YES for all commit/push/tag/deploy
こさめ/GPT PM: safety gate and approval delegation
Review and hold/reject authority at any stage

requiredFor: Any git add / commit / push / tag
Any file edit beyond dry-run packet generation
Any operation outside allowed file zones
approvalChain: Step 1: こさめ/GPT PM reviews and approves stage output
Step 2: じゅんやさん issues final YES before git or deploy operations

safetyBoundary.noRealRepoEdit: Target repo files are not modified during dry-run phases
safetyBoundary.noRealGitOps: No git add/commit/push/tag executed without explicit human YES
safetyBoundary.noRealDeploy: No deploy executed in any phase of this prototype
safetyBoundary.noSecretRead: No .env, secrets/**, or credentials/** read at any stage
safetyBoundary.noCustomerData: No PII, insurance, health, or financial data accessed
safetyBoundary.dryRunOnly: All stage outputs are packets/plans — no external side effects

secretBoundary.rule: No .env / secrets / credentials read at any stage

customerDataBoundary.rule: No PII / insurance / health / financial data accessed at any stage

stageOutputs.name: Intake
stageOutputs.outputSummary: 営業DXリード向け一括返信機能 — intake confirmed

stageOutputs.name: Work Order
stageOutputs.outputSummary: work order generated — allowed: src/leads/**, tests/**

stageOutputs.name: External Repo Preflight
stageOutputs.outputSummary: preflight passed — no secrets, no forbidden files

stageOutputs.name: Commit Candidate Decision
stageOutputs.outputSummary: pending じゅんやさん YES

commitCandidateDecision.reason: All dry-run stages passed. Awaiting こさめ/GPT PM review, then じゅんやさん final YES.
commitCandidateDecision.note: readyForCommit will become true only after explicit じゅんやさん YES

nextVersionCandidates.suggestion: First Real Repo Edit with Human Gate — execute one approved edit in real target repo with full safety checks
First Commit Candidate Execution — execute git add/commit with じゅんやさん YES

dangerousActionsDenied: destructive delete (rm -rf, git clean -f, git reset --hard)
